close_reason: Schema design complete. Created FlatBuffer schemas, wrapper modules, updated system_keys.ex key patterns, persistence_phase.ex writes new shard_keys format. Follow-up tickets created for storage_teams removal.
description:
## Summary

Design the system key value schema for metadata distribution. The current decomposed layout keys are written but never read - this designs the target format.

## Key Design Decisions

### Routing
- **Uniform ceiling search**: All keys (user and metadata) routed via ceiling search on `shard_keys/{end_key}` → tag
- **Golden ratio log distribution**: `get_log_indices(tag, log_count, replication_factor)` - deterministic, stable if log order preserved
- **No special cases**: Metadata keys (`\xff...`) naturally resolve to tag 0

### Identity Format
- **All services store OtpRef**: `{otp_name, node}` tuple
- **Durable IDs in key path**: `\xff/system/layout/logs/{log_id}` stores just OtpRef

### Key Patterns (Category 2 - Cluster-Wide Metadata)
| Key | Value |
|-----|-------|
| `\xff/system/cluster/epoch` | uint64 |
| `\xff/system/layout/sequencer` | OtpRef |
| `\xff/system/layout/proxies` | [OtpRef] |
| `\xff/system/layout/resolvers/{end_key}` | OtpRef |
| `\xff/system/layout/logs/{log_id}` | OtpRef |
| `\xff/system/shard_keys/{end_key}` | uint32 (tag) |
| `\xff/system/shards/{tag}` | ShardMetadata |
| `\xff/system/materializer_keys/{end_key}` | MaterializerList |

### ShardMetadata (minimal)
```elixir
%Bedrock.ShardMetadata{
  key_range: {start_key, end_key},
  born_at: version(),
  ended_at: version() | nil
}
```
Tag in key path. Genealogy deferred to split/merge implementation.

### Bootstrap (Object Storage)
```
bedrock://bootstrap/cluster_identity → ClusterBootstrap
```
Contains: cluster_id, epoch, logs list, metadata_snapshot_path

### Encoding
FlatBuffers via `:flatbuffer` hex package (https://hex.pm/packages/flatbuffer). Runtime schema definition (no codegen).

## Implementation Notes

### 1. shard_keys replaces storage_teams
`shard_keys` fully replaces `storage_teams`. Remove:
- `StorageTeamDescriptor` module
- `key_or_range_to_tags`, `find_logs_for_tags` in finalization.ex
- `storage_teams` field in TransactionSystemLayout

Routing uses ceiling search on `shard_keys`, log selection uses golden ratio algorithm.

### 2. Initial shard_keys written during recovery
- `initialization_phase.ex` determines initial shards (tags, key ranges)
- `persistence_phase.ex` writes `\xff/system/shard_keys/{end_key}` → tag for each shard
- Director provides initial shard_keys to proxy via `recover_from/3`

### 3. Ceiling search via ETS ordered_set
- Proxy maintains `shard_keys` in ETS `ordered_set` table
- Ceiling lookup via `ets:next/2`
- Updated when metadata mutations arrive via `merge_fn`

### 4. FlatBuffers runtime usage
- Use `:flatbuffer` from hex.pm
- Define schema in Elixir code, encode/decode at runtime
- No codegen step, no .fbs files

### 5. Log ordering for golden ratio
- Sort log_ids lexicographically once at initialization
- Build `%{index => log_id}` map for O(1) lookup
- Golden ratio returns indices, map converts to log_ids

## Files
- NEW: `lib/bedrock/control_plane/config/shard_metadata.ex`
- MOD: `lib/bedrock/system_keys.ex` (key parsing, encoding/decoding)
- MOD: `lib/bedrock/control_plane/director/recovery/persistence_phase.ex`
- DEL: `lib/bedrock/control_plane/config/storage_team_descriptor.ex`

## Full Plan
See: ~/.claude/plans/nifty-launching-starfish.md

## Open Items (from critical review)
1. ~~shard_keys replaces storage_teams~~ RESOLVED
2. ~~Initial shard_keys written by persistence_phase~~ RESOLVED
3. ~~Ceiling search implementation~~ RESOLVED (ETS ordered_set)
4. ~~FlatBuffers usage pattern~~ RESOLVED (runtime via :flatbuffer)
5. ~~Log ordering for golden ratio~~ RESOLVED (sort + index map)
6. Cross-shard transaction ordering (out of scope - existing behavior)
7. Metadata read path for proxies (out of scope - jwii ticket)
8. Recovery quorum semantics (out of scope - existing behavior)
title: Design system key value schema for metadata distribution
